calm.description: Long, smooth curves with low noise frequency. Good for meditative pieces.

turbulent.description: High-frequency noise with short, chaotic strokes. Dense and energetic.

dense.description: Maximum line count, thin strokes. Creates a texture that reads almost solid from a distance.

sparse.description: Minimal lines, wide spacing. Each curve is individually legible.

spiral.description: Low noise scale with high step count creates long spiraling paths. Hypnotic on paper.
